ab: Awi, uka sino da! Sai tikuh maruy!
en: Awi, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: Ga prayan hi ka kingal rusuq nana, anaq ini baruy hayan!
ch: M:廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧!
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: Ini baka kingal rusuq, usa maruy daha rusuq dungal.
ch: W:一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: Mbaruy ku sino. Ya namu ga gnbaruy sino?
ch: M:我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎?
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?
Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: Daha rusuq, ma kingal lubuy beras.
ch: M:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: Nii ka beras, maanu ngalun su dungal?
ch: W:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?
Are there eggs?
We are out of eggs.
I want to buy some clothes.
What kind of clothes do you like?
I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.
How about this red one?
Do you have another color?
We have white and blue ones too.

ch: M:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: Awi, mnusa su inu ka soni? Mnusa su pstarin?
ch: W:Awi，你剛剛去哪裡了?你去運動嗎?
en: Awi, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: Uxe, snkgulan ku pai musa maruy sama.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: Ye kiya! Niqal ali su keeman? Spuwe ta mekan ido.
ch: W:這樣啊，你晚上有沒有空?要不要和我一起吃飯。
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: Bobo na da ho? Maha ku maruy lukus.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.
Then, I will go with you.

ab: Sndamac su bale! Piya pila ka sama nii?
ch: M:你好，請問這把菜多少錢?
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?
The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.
How much are these sweet potatoes?
Sweet potatoes are thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: Biqi ku daha bnkeyan sama, ma kingal toting bunga.
ch: M:請給我兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
